title: quartinia repens
intro: Quartinia repens, also known as creeping quartinia, is a type of flowering plant in the asteraceae family, native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Quartinia repens is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
